Source   Edit  

Imports

common

Types

JsonReader = object
  options*: JsonReaderOptions
  vein*: Vein
  bufferLocks*: int
  bufferPos*: int
  line*, column*: int
Source   Edit   
JsonReaderOptions = object
  doLineColumn*: bool = true
  handleUtf16*: bool = true  ## jsony converts utf 16 characters in strings by default apparently so does stdlib json
  forceUtf8Strings*: bool    ## jsony errors if binary data in strings is not utf8, this is now opt in
  rawJsNanInf*: bool         ## parses raw NaN/Infinity/-Infinity as in js and json5
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc error(reader: var JsonReader; msg: string) {.inline,
    ...raises: [JsonValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Shortcut to raise an exception. Source   Edit
